subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1912-09-16
subcodes.first_line: I am bearing the discomforts of this journey with stopovers so that the Cause of God may be protected from any breach.... Because of certain people who sought to fulfill their personal desires
subcodes.first_line_orig: این صدمات سفر و حضر را برای این تحمل مینمایم که بلکه امر الله از بعضی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @Shrines and Holy places, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @House of Justice, @unity; oneness of humanity
